Localization.Description: Targeted attack with the Triangulation Trojan. Sensitive information may leak from devices running the iOS operating system.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: PT NAD detected C&C communication between hosts {src.host} and {dst.host} on host {event_src.host}
C&C communication between hosts {src.host} and {dst.host} was detected based on an indicator of compromise from reputation list "{subject.name}" of type "{subject.type}" on host {event_src.host}
